tasks.description: Close FGAP-035 — eliminate writeBootstrapPointer signature default and initProject .project literal. Make contextDir required at the bootstrap-write surface so DEC-0015 enacts at line 1, not as a Phase 6 promise.
acceptance_criteria: writeBootstrapPointer signature has no parameter default — contextDir: string required
initProject signature changes to initProject(cwd: string, contextDir: string); body replaces .project literal with contextDir parameter
project-dir.ts JSDoc rewritten to remove default-as-feature framing; no "Default contextDir is .project" / "legacy substrate-dir name" / "future /context init ceremony will prompt" wording remains
index.ts initProject body comment block (lines 232-237) rewritten to remove same default-as-feature framing

handleInit subcommand handler signature changes to handleInit(args, ctx): parses positional contextDir via args.trim().split(/\s+/)[0]; missing arg emits ctx.ui.notify error "/project init requires a substrate dir name (e.g. '/project init .project' or '/project init .context'). Per DEC-0015, no default." and returns; non-empty arg passed to initProject(ctx.cwd, contextDir)
PROJECT_SUBCOMMANDS init dispatch entry changes from handler: (_args, ctx) => handleInit(ctx) to handler: (args, ctx) => handleInit(args, ctx)

project-init pi tool parameters schema gains required contextDir field: Type.Object({ contextDir: Type.String({ description: "Substrate dir name (e.g. .project). Required per DEC-0015 — no default." }) })
project-init pi tool execute body destructures params.contextDir and passes to initProject(ctx.cwd, params.contextDir)
All 168 existing test sites continue to pass without modification (they already pass .project explicitly)
Full test suite green across all 4 packages

Production-source grep returns zero hardcoded substrate-dir literals: grep -rn "".project"" packages/pi-context/src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v .test.ts | grep -v project-dir.ts (excluding @deprecated PROJECT_DIR/SCHEMAS_DIR const exports per Phase 7 separation of concerns)
grep -n "= PROJECT_DIR" packages/pi-context/src/ returns 0 matches
tasks.notes: CLOSED at HEAD e88d7ee. FGAP-035 implementation: 11 cascade rows applied at f17efa3 + Q4 follow-up site at e88d7ee. All 4 packages green (pi-context 401/0/0; pi-jit-agents 150/0/1; pi-workflows 824/0/2; pi-behavior-monitors 157/0/0). Adversarial probe verdict GREEN (8 PASS, 1 PASS-post-fix Q4, 1 PASS-substantively Q10). UX decision (positional arg required; ctx.ui.notify error on missing) preserved verbatim in handleInit. project-init pi tool gains required contextDir Type.Object param. See VER-001 for full criteria_results.

tasks.description: Close FGAP-036 — add scripts/orchestrator/compile-task-context.ts. Canonicalizes implementer-task-block composition from substrate inputs (TASK-NNN + explore-report-path + commit-subject-template). Enables FGAP-035 dispatch via canonical orchestrator-side context-compilation surface rather than hand-authored /tmp/task-template-*.md.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/orchestrator/compile-task-context.ts exists and is shebang-tsx executable
Args: --task-id TASK-NNN, --explore-report <path>, --commit-subject <template>, optional --required-reading-extra <comma-separated paths>
Reads task entry from .project/tasks.json via @davidorex/pi-context/block-api readBlock; fails fast if task id absent
Extracts cascade-target table from explore-report via inline extract-markdown-section.ts invocation (or shared helper)
Emits XML-structured task-block to stdout in the shape compile-implementation-context.ts expects via --task-template @file

Composes: read-list (from task.files + required-reading-extra), apply-order (numbered per cascade-table rows), concrete-edits (per-row from explore-report Required-change column), commit-spec (subject from template + forensic body skeleton), STOP triggers boilerplate, report-back format tables-only
FGAP-035 implementation context compiled via this script (validates the surface end-to-end)
tasks.notes: CLOSED at HEAD e88d7ee. compile-task-context.ts landed at 7883cea (creation) + 5293cca (console.log normalization) + e3a0247 (build-task-template.ts → compile-task-context.ts rename mirroring pi-jit-agents compileAgent vocabulary). Acceptance criterion 7 (FGAP-035 implementation context compiled via this script) validated end-to-end through the FGAP-035 dispatch chain. See VER-002.

tasks.description: Close FGAP-038 — add scripts/orchestrator/inject-context-items.ts. Item-level substrate-item projection into subagent briefs. Selector + projection + format args. Doubles as test surface for block-schema shape discovery: every friction point encountered while writing the script gets filed as a follow-up FGAP, NOT silently worked-around.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/orchestrator/inject-context-items.ts exists, shebang-tsx executable
Args: --items <block:itemId[,block:itemId...]> + --format markdown|json|xml + optional --fields <comma-list> projection
Reads each (block, itemId) via @davidorex/pi-context/block-api readBlock + filter by id

json format emits items as JSON array; xml format wraps each item in <item block="X" id="Y">...</item>; markdown format uses per-block-kind render macros (FGAP-037 dependency — until macros land, markdown emits a minimal fallback projection)
Fails fast if any block:itemId selector is unresolvable; reports the unresolvable selector verbatim
compile-explore-context.ts + compile-implementation-context.ts gain a --context-items arg that splices this script output into the context at a <context_items> XML block position
FGAP-035 Explore re-dispatch uses --context-items framework-gaps:FGAP-035,tasks:TASK-031,decisions:DEC-0015 validating the surface end-to-end
Every friction point encountered while writing the script that surfaces a schema-shape question gets filed as a follow-up FGAP — substrate-canon discipline, not silently worked-around
tasks.notes: CLOSED at HEAD e88d7ee. inject-context-items.ts landed at 2c3794a; --context-items arg integrated into compile-{explore,implementation}-context.ts at ad02726. Acceptance criterion 7 (FGAP-035 Explore re-dispatch via canonical surface with item-level injection) validated: rendered context embeds <context_items> verbatim; Explore agent produced 11-row cascade table without OR-hedging because TASK-031 UX decision was injected. Friction points (array_key heuristic / id-field assumption / singleton-block shape / colon-escape) filed inline in JSDoc + commit body per dogfood discipline. See VER-003.
